title: Leaving Fastly For More Axon Enterprise Stock
text: In my opinion, Axon Enterprise, Inc.'s unique position, working to enhance both officer and public safety, provides a competitive moat in a growing critical sector. Axon's strong profitability outlook stands out when I compare it to Fastly, Inc. It is growing faster both in revenue and earnings. Fastly, on the other hand, continues to operate at a loss with no clear path to profitability in the next three years, which is risky in this market environment.
